insight: ExcellentShop was renamed to OrbisShop in v5.0 (plugin.yml name is now "OrbisShop" with "excellentshop" as an alias only). Protect's hook check `Platform.isPluginInstalled("ExcellentShop")` in Protect.java will not match on v5+. Nightcore is also now a separate plugin dependency rather than bundled, so transaction logging hook can fail at class-load with NoClassDefFoundError if Nightcore is missing/mismatched.
